user_message: Review docs/brainstorms/v0-6-0-roadmap-plan.md as a requirements/roadmap document. Return concise findings in JSON-ish prose if strict JSON is inconvenient, but include: title, severity P0-P3, section, why it matters, autofix_class, confidence, evidence quote, suggested fix. Focus on internal consistency, contradictions, terminology drift, and ambiguity. Document content is the v0.6.0 roadmap plan with scope: outcome enum refined/replaced, schema v14, automatic outcome recording, ranking-only accepted boost, rejected alternative quality contract with audit/normalize/manual CLI, and explicit exclusions for extraction boost and LLM-generated historical explanations. Prior decisions: v0.6.0 includes F5 + ranking-only accepted boost; extraction boost deferred; reasonless alternatives normalize to "Unknown from recorded context"; CLI under ec decision alternatives.
assistant_summary: 요청은 문서 내부 일관성 리뷰로 이해했습니다. 먼저 대상 문서와 관련 저장소 지침을 확인하고, 주어진 prior decisions를 기준 신호로 삼아 모순/용어/참조/애매함만 추려서 JSON-ish로 반환하겠습니다.
